repositories.name: destructive_command_guard
repositories.description: The Destructive Command Guard (dcg) is for blocking dangerous git and shell commands from being executed by agents.

repositories.name: airi
repositories.description: 💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported.

repositories.name: awesome-llm-apps
repositories.description: 100+ AI Agent & RAG apps you can actually run — clone, customize, ship.

repositories.name: hallmark
repositories.description: Anti-AI-slop design skill for Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex.

repositories.name: Win11Debloat
repositories.description: A simple, lightweight PowerShell script that allows you to remove pre-installed apps, disable telemetry, as well as perform various other changes to declutter and customize your Windows experience. Win11Debloat works for both Windows 10 and Windows 11.

repositories.name: graphify
repositories.description: AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph.

repositories.name: exercises-dataset
repositories.description: 1,324-exercise fitness dataset — animation GIFs, 180×180 thumbnails, muscle-group & equipment data, and step-by-step instructions in 6 languages. The exercise data layer behind the LogPress app.

repositories.description: 💫 Toolkit to help you get started with Spec-Driven Development

repositories.name: marketingskills
